transcript: Speaker A: दोस्तों मेरा पति मुझे बिल्कुल प्यार नहीं करता इस बात का तो मुझे पहले से पता ही था पर देखो इसका कहीं चक्कर भी चल रहा है यह मुझे और अच्छे से आज पता चल गया है। यह देखो इसकी मदद से... तुम्हें मैं पसंद आ रही... देखो अगर आपको भी अपने पति को ऐसे ही पकड़ना है तो प्ले स्टोर पर जाओ और यह वाला ऐप जल्दी से डाउनलोड करो। [Friends, my husband doesn't love me at all, I already knew this, but look, he is also having an affair, I found out even better today. Look, with the help of this... 'I am liking you'... Look, if you also want to catch your husband like this, go to the Play Store and download this app quickly.]
on_screen_text: Sneha, Hi baby, Hi jaann, We're going to resort pack your things honey, Yess yess we will have so much funn, I hope your wife doesn't get to know about this plan, No no she will won't, She's a fool woman i can fool her anytime you know, Haha haha right, I lovee youu you are so smart darling, She's a idiot no honey, She isn't smart like you, I love you 3000, My babyyy, See you in the evening, Don't forget to Pack that pink dress of yours, You love it naa, I will do whatever u say my loveee, You are my world honey, Zinglish: English Speaking App, Translate, Chat with Za
summary: A woman uses the Zinglish app to translate her husband's English WhatsApp messages, revealing his infidelity. She demonstrates the translation feature on her phone screen. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the Zinglish app from the Play Store.
